name: viperstick-chart
title: Viperstick Chart (candlestick)
description: Candlestick chart for the finance reptiles: one snake per candle (wicks are tails, the fat mid-body spans open→close), volume lane of juveniles, a moving-average trend snake, last-price tag, and a live mode where the newest candle hasn't slept since listing.
author: Aman Varshney
